name: Vidkun
bio:
Physical Appearance: Nord male. Wore sack cloth pants, sandals, and a shirt.
Race: Nord
Personality Keywords: eager, unfortunate, naive, deceased
Role: Vidkun was a young mage and Associate of the Mages Guild at the Cheydinhal Guild Hall. He was sent on a dangerous assignment by Falcar.
Home Location Information: The Cheydinhal Mages Guild Hall.
His Fate: Vidkun was sent by Falcar to retrieve the Ring of Burden from the well - a task designed to be impossible due to the ring's weight. He drowned in the attempt. His body can be found in the well along with the ring.
His Character: According to Deetsan, Vidkun was an Associate just like any other - perhaps not the brightest, but very eager. After receiving his assignment from Falcar, he disappeared, dropping out of existence with no one knowing what happened. Falcar refused to say a word about it.
The Aftermath: Deetsan mourns that Vidkun didn't deserve to die like that. Uurwen considers it an awful way to go. Eilonwy wonders if the Mages Council will do anything about it. The guild keeps things quiet, with Cheydinhal residents only noting his absence and assuming he's busy. However, news reached other guild halls, with Teekeeus of Chorrol shocked that a Mages Guild associate was found dead.
Personality - The Eager Victim: Vidkun was an eager young mage who was taken advantage of by Falcar. His eagerness and perhaps naivety led him to accept a deadly assignment without questioning it. He became the victim of Falcar's cruelty, dying alone in a well attempting an impossible task.
author: Bethesda
